assets.description: Transparent compact heated forge module icon with amber heat and teal signal accents.
assets.intended_use: Production lane icon for forge-line lane selection or status display.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation on chroma key, locally keyed to alpha, cropped, sharpened, and resized to 96x96 PNG.

assets.description: Opaque dark factory dispatch floor title art with three production lanes, queue rails, and teal signal lines.
assets.intended_use: Title card, menu background, or game splash art.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation, center-cropped to 16:9, contrast/sharpness adjusted, and resized to 800x450 opaque PNG.

procedural_fallbacks.reason: Live floor rails remain procedural so lane cards, output tokens, and incident states can change without a stale raster board.
Core resource icons, shortage states, and output pulses are deterministic CSS hooks tied to current resource values.
Output delivery uses a CSS token keyed to the current job's output resource.
Shortage markers are deterministic data attributes on jobs, queues, lanes, and resources.
Overdrive glow and faster conveyor motion come from lane overdrive state.
Jam sparks supplement the local fault icon and blocked lane state.
Incident badges are procedural and tied to freight, rail sabotage, and crisis card data attributes.
Shift summary treatment uses live summary data and upgrade-choice state.
Upgrade family icons are CSS glyphs keyed by upgrade ids and affordability.

notes: Created an original mono-first dark factory raster asset pack using Codex built-in image generation only; no OpenAI SDK, Images API, API key, logos, or readable UI labels were used. Transparent icons were produced through chroma-key removal and validated for alpha corners.
